name: SHRTTRM
description: Institutional Course Maintenance Term Header Repeating Table

columns.name: SHRTTRM_PIDM
columns.description: Internal Identification Number of Student.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_TERM_CODE
columns.description: Term Code. Term of student institutional course record.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_UPDATE_SOURCE_IND
columns.description: Source Indicator. Indicates sourse of how record was created. Valid values are: S - System created during grade roll process, and U - User created.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_PRE_CATALOG_IND
columns.description: This field is the Pre-Catalog Indicator. It specifies if the term course information is based on the existing Banner catalog or is conversion data being entered prior to the Banner catalog data. Valid values are: Y - Pre-catalog, and N - Current Catalog.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_RECORD_STATUS_IND
columns.description: Status Indicator. Specifies the status of the term record. Valid values are: G - Grade Mailer Pending, C - Grade Mailer processing complete, R - Revised Grade Mailer Pending, N - New Record.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_RECORD_STATUS_DATE
columns.description: Status Date. Date associated with the status of the record.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_GRADE_MAILING_DATE
columns.description: Grade Mailer Date. Indicates the date grade mailer was sent to the student.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_GRADE_MAILER_CHG_DATE
columns.description: Grade Mailer Change Date. Indicates the date a revised or duplicate grade mailer was sent to the student.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_GRADE_MAILER_DUP
columns.description: Grade Mailer Duplicate Indicator. Specifies that duplicate grade mailer should be sent to the student. Valid value is Y - Send duplicate mailer.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_GRADE_MAILER_DUP_DATE
columns.description: Duplicate Grade Mailer Date. Indicates date duplicate grade mailer was sent.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_EXAM_CODE
columns.description: Examination Code. Identifies a special examination the student took during the term.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_CODE_TRANSCRIPT_DIST
columns.description: This field is not currently used.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_ASTD_CODE_END_OF_TERM
columns.description: This field is the End of Term Academic Standing Code. It Identifies student academic standing for the term (probation, good standing, etc.). Calculated based on the academic standing rules during the end of term standing process or may be entered directly.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_ASTD_DATE_END_OF_TERM
columns.description: Date Academic Standing was entered.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Activity Date. Specifies the date record was created or updated.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_ASTD_CODE_DL
columns.description: Deans List Code. Identifies if student qualified for deans list for the term. Calculated based on academic standing deans list rules or may be directly entered.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_ASTD_DATE_DL
columns.description: Date Deans List Status was entered.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_WRSN_CODE
columns.description: Reason for withdrawal from this institution.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_SBGI_CODE_TRANS
columns.description: Institution to which the student will transfer

columns.name: SHRTTRM_PREV_CODE
columns.description: Academic History Term record Progress Evaluation code. This code is populated by SHRPREV.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_PREV_DATE
columns.description: Academic History Term record Progress Evaluation date. This is the date progress evaluation code was updated.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_CAST_CODE
columns.description: Academic History Term record Combined Academic Standing code. This code is populated by SHRPREV.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_CAST_DATE
columns.description: Academic History Term record Combined Academic Standing date. This is the date combined academic standing code was updated.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_SCPS_CODE
columns.description: Student Centric Period code.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SHRTTRM_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SHRTTRM_GUID
columns.description: GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.
